description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 12 times.
Summons 5 homing arrows that track enemies. Upon attacking, consumes 1 arrow to deal additional Physical DMG to the enemy.

Deals Physical DMG to enemies in a straight line and knocks them down for [???->3 sec]. This damage increases based on the target’s lost HP, up to a maximum of 100%. Additionally, against Bosses, deals additional Physical DMG, and this damage is applied with 500 higher Physical DEF Penetration.

After using a Skill or Normal Attack, increases ATK by 24*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Crit Chance by [100->80] for [10sec->7sec]. [Moonlight Arrow] stacks up to [3->6] times. At max stacks, [Moonlight Arrow] cannot be gained during the duration, but Normal Attacks fire 3 additional arrows.

dark.unified: Has a 50% chance to stun enemies hit for [1 sec->0.5 sec].
Damage dealt to bosses increases by 5% per stack.

description.unified: [Moonlight Flash] Increases DMG by {0}%, and P.DMG the target takes by 20% for 10 sec.
[Moonlight Arrow] increases normal attack DMG by [(added) 50%] and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by {0}% per stack. [(removed) Increases ATK Spd by 100]

dark.unified: Your Critical Rate is reduced by 300, but Critical DMG increases by [150%->70%].

description.unified: On Crit, increases ATK Spd by {0}[->%] for 10 sec. During the duration, Normal Attacks fire an additional arrow that deals {1}% extra Physical DMG to the target. This additional DMG can be triggered once every [(added) 0.5 sec].

Summons the soul of Green Wind, Notos for 13sec, increasing own ATK by [50%->45%]. During the duration, every 4sec, deals P.DMG to an enemy, knocks them back for [2 sec->1sec], and immediately reduces cooldown of all own skills by 1sec. [(removed) increasing own Crit DMG by 50%]

1.from: Increases DMG by 50%, and every time the Soul attacks an enemy, recovers own Mana by 1000.
1.unified: Increases DMG by 50%. [(removed) recovers own Mana by 1000 every time the Soul attacks]

2.from: Increases DMG by 30% and reduces Skill Activation requirements to 40 times.
2.to: Increases DMG by 25% and reduces activation requirement to 45 times.
2.unified: Increases DMG by [30%->25%] and reduces activation requirement to [40->45] times.
